_meta.purpose: Authoritative source-of-truth for Sergei's preprints. Metadata pulled from DataCite API (figshare registers DOIs via DataCite). verifier/daily_commentary/grant_drafter MUST read titles from here — never hardcode, to avoid the FinAgent/prompt-injection mislabel bug.
_meta.author: Solovev, Sergei
